Title: Master Yi
Age: Current41 – 51 years old Timeline Born946 AN – 956 AN Edit

children.title: Early Life
children.textContent:
Yi was born in the village of Wuju in the province of Bahrl in Ionia. His parents were swordsmiths and he longed to learn the ways of the sword after seeing warriors who carried blades with poems to their names enter his parents’ workshop. He spent the mornings sparring with his mother and his nights reciting poetry with his father.

Soon, he began to train under the Wuju masters. He surpassed all expectations and became known as the “Young Master” Yi. But he was always curious about the rest of Ionia. However, he was forbidden to leave the village with his blade because the Wuju sought to keep their swordsmanship a secret and believed it was too precious to draw blood.

This all changed when Noxus invaded. Yi decided to forego the Wuju traditions in order to defend his homeland. He was like a one-man army, sweeping the outsiders with blinding swordplay. He then journeyed with some of his fellow disciples to Navori, a critical location in the war.

The Noxians identified the Wuju as a threat that they could not ignore and used chemical attacks to destroy the village of Wuju. Yi returned the only surviving disciple, slain in spirit when he learned of what had happened to his home village.

children.title: The Darkin Saga
children.textContent:
Master Yi and his order discovered 1 the Darkin bloodletters, the weapons in which Xolaani was imprisoned, sealed away within his temple. Kayn, who had discovered the weapon's location, attacked the temple, seeking to claim the power of a second Darkin weapon. This ended in the deaths of all of Yi's new order, with the exception of his protégé, Jun. Unable to handle her failure, Jun gave in to Xolaani's whispers, taking up the blades to try and save herself and her master. In an instant, Jun was lost, Xolaani completely claiming her as a vessel.

Xolaani was later defeated in battle against Aatrox, Mihira, Kayle, and Ryze.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent:
Yi is a thin, agile man with tan skin and dark brown hair. He usually wears a goatee of varying lengths, sometimes long enough to be tied off at numerous points. There is a red rune seemingly tattooed on his forehead.

His slim-fitting armor typically features shades of silver, green, brown, and golden yellow. The most notable feature of his combat attire is a large helmet that covers his eyes with a cluster of seven greenish-yellow lenses.

mainContent.title: Personality
mainContent.textContent:
Yi is an extremely disciplined warrior who believes in violence only as a last resort. He is dedicated to the pursuit of wisdom and inner peace as much as martial technique and hopes to impart these qualities onto his students, for whom he cares deeply. He is a humble mentor, gentle but firm.

Yi fights for what he believes is right, including the defense of Ionia from Noxus and the preservation of the Wuju style. A man of conscience, he was wracked with guilt after his actions led to the destruction of his home village. He responded with obsessive self-training, both physical and mental, in order to calm his heart.

children.title: Master Doran
children.textContent: Yi was trained by Master Doran.

children.title: Wukong
children.textContent: Master Yi has a close teacher- student relationship with Wukong. As the last survivor of Wuju village, he taught Wukong the Wuju Style to honor the legacy of his lost home (although the Monkey King uses a staff rather than a sword).
